headings: Section 12. Applications for Payment, Releases, Lien-Free Project
text: - 12.1 The Subcontractor shall  submit  to  the  Contractor's  office,  requisition  for  payment,  covering  the value of the Subcontract Work completed to the satisfaction of the Owner during that month in accordance with the approved Schedule of Values (Section 3.9 of the Subcontract) and Section 10 above. If said requisitions are not delivered by the Subcontractor as per Section 3 and Section 10 of this Subcontract, Subcontractor's requisition shall not be processed for payment until the next pay period, or Contractor may estimate any amount due Subcontractor for the current pay period and Subcontractor shall be bound by such estimate.
